detectedPattern: Machine-learning executor issues 138 and 140 both received PASS_WITH_WARNINGS due to synthetic test datasets being too small for stable model evaluation. Issue 138: 'Tiny synthetic datasets may yield single-class eval splits; stratified fallback used.' Issue 140: 'Golden fixture augmentation required for stable scale/cut predictions on small synthetic datasets.' The same root cause (insufficient golden fixture size) triggered warnings in two consecutive ML issues.
planningSignal: ML issues do not specify a minimum training/evaluation dataset size in their acceptance criteria. The machine-learning executor skill has no gate enforcing golden fixture minimums before an implementation is considered complete.
architectureSignal: The machine-learning executor domain (src/intelligence, src/modules/ml) relies on synthetic fixtures generated at test time. When those fixtures have fewer than ~100 samples, stratified splits become unstable and single-class warnings surface during review. This boundary is undocumented in any MODULE.md or executor skill.
decompositionSignal: Issues 138 and 140 acceptance criteria did not include a fixture size requirement. The to-issues decomposition template for ML issues does not prompt for minimum dataset size, allowing underspecified ML work to reach review without adequate test data.
reviewSignal: Both issues received PASS_WITH_WARNINGS rather than FAIL. The review skill flagged the fixture size concern but still passed the issue. This allows the gap to propagate to future ML issues without a forcing function to fix it upstream.

recommendedBacklogItem.title: Add golden fixture minimum size gate to machine-learning executor and issue template
recommendedBacklogItem.description: 1. Update the machine-learning executor skill to require golden fixtures with ≥100 samples before implementation is considered complete. 2. Add a validation check in the validate skill: if the executor domain is machine-learning, verify at least one fixture file has ≥100 rows. 3. Update the to-issues issue template for ML tasks to include an AC: 'Golden fixture contains ≥100 samples for stable stratified split.' 4. Add routing hint in agent-runtime.config.yml: {domain: machine-learning, signal: synthetic_dataset_small, action: require_golden_fixture_min_100}.
